definitions.text: Existing in nature. Existing in the nature of a person or thing; innate, not acquired or learned. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: The species will be under threat if its natural habitat is destroyed.
It's natural for business to be slow on Tuesdays.

definitions.text: Existing in the nature of a person or thing; innate, not acquired or learned. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
Normally associated with a particular person or thing; inherently related to the nature of a thing or creature.
examples: The species will be under threat if its natural habitat is destroyed.

definitions.text: A native inhabitant of a place, country, etc.
A note that is not or is no longer to be modified by an accidental.
The symbol ♮ used to indicate such a natural note.
